Coming Soon · Augusta, KS

Beautifully Renovated Custom Ranch on One Acre

Timeless 1974 construction, extensively updated for modern living, with a rare detached climate-controlled shop designed for collectors, hobbyists, and exceptional storage.

View GalleryExplore the Shop

Welcome home

A timeless ranch, thoughtfully transformed.

Built in 1974 and extensively remodeled, this custom ranch combines the strength and character of established construction with the comfort, finish, and convenience expected today.

Set on a beautifully maintained one-acre lot in Augusta, the home offers updated living spaces, a fully remodeled kitchen, fresh interior and exterior finishes, bonus finished lower-level space, and outdoor areas designed for gathering.

The rare detached climate-controlled shop is a defining feature, offering exceptional flexibility for vehicles, hobbies, business use, storage, or a future studio-style retreat.

Explore the PropertyRequest Details
1Acre lot
2,700Approx. sq ft
1974Built
6+Vehicle shop capacity

Property highlights

Move-in ready, with the hard work already done.

This is more than cosmetic refresh. The home, landscape, systems, and outbuilding have been improved with long-term livability in mind.

Remodeled Kitchen

Solid-surface counters, new appliances, updated cabinetry, and a modernized main living flow.

Finished Lower Level

Bonus square footage including an office with adjoining private bath.

Outdoor Living

Professional lawn care, irrigation from a private well, landscape lighting, and fire pit area.

The shop

A rare detached shop that changes what this property can be.

Designed to visually complement the residence, the detached shop offers climate-controlled, insulated, drywalled space with a bathroom, multiple garage bays, and a separate mower/storage bay.

See the Shop
